sidebar.deleteProjectConfirm: Delete this project and all its conversations? Files in the project folder are untouched.

sessionMenu.renameDialogDescription: The new title will also appear in the sidebar.

tasks.title: Scheduled tasks
tasks.subtitle: Create scheduled tasks in any conversation with natural language; they run in that conversation on schedule and keep the results there.
tasks.empty: No scheduled tasks yet. Just ask in any conversation, e.g. "Generate an AI daily report at 9am every day".

connectPhone.title: Connect phone
connectPhone.helpText: Connect Chengxiaobang with WeChat or Feishu and keep the conversation going from your phone.
connectPhone.wechatBindingsEmptyHint: Send Chengxiaobang a first message in WeChat; the bound session will appear here automatically.
connectPhone.feishuBindingsEmptyHint: Message the bot in Feishu, or @ mention it in a group chat. Bound sessions will appear here automatically.
connectPhone.wechatScanHint: Scan with WeChat on your phone. After confirmation, WeChat messages enter Chengxiaobang.
connectPhone.feishuScanHint: Scan with Feishu or Lark on your phone. Authorization binds automatically.
connectPhone.subtitle: Connect Chengxiaobang to Feishu or Lark and keep chatting from your phone.
connectPhone.feishuDesc: Generate an official PersonalAgent QR code. After phone confirmation, credentials are saved automatically and the long connection starts.
connectPhone.scanHint: Scan with the selected platform's mobile client.
connectPhone.autoBindHint: Authorization saves and connects automatically; no App ID copy-paste needed.
connectPhone.connectedHint: Connected. Feishu messages from your phone will sync into Chengxiaobang.

placeholderRotation: Type anything, let 程小帮 handle it
Try: tidy up this folder for me
Try: draft a weekly project report
composer.runningPlaceholder: 程小帮 is working on the current request…
composer.blankProjectHint: A folder with this name will be created under Documents as the project.
composer.askUserWaiting: 程小帮 is waiting for your answer…

context.title: Context usage
context.unavailable: This model has no registered context window, so only message size can be estimated.

status.over_threshold: Will compact before the next run

permission.approvalDesc: Run ordinary project edits and routine development commands automatically; ask for sensitive files, external side effects, or risky commands.
permission.smartApprovalDesc: Run ordinary project edits and development commands automatically; block only dangerous, sensitive, or external side-effect actions.
permission.fullAccessDesc: Run every tool automatically without confirmation (higher risk)
permission.fullAccessWarningDescription: Full access runs every tool automatically. It may read or write local files, run commands, or create external side effects, so use it only when you trust the current task and context.

onboarding.title: Add a model to get started
onboarding.desc: Enter an API key for any model to start using 程小帮. You can also open Settings for full configuration.

approvalDialog.title: Permission required
approvalDialog.projectDescription: Do not ask again for the same command
approvalDialog.keyboardHint: Use Tab / arrow keys to choose, Enter to confirm

chat.compactionHint: Earlier messages were summarized; future turns continue from the summary
chat.artifactPreview: Click to preview on the right
chat.artifactOpenExternal: Click to open in the system app

askUser.required: This question still needs an answer
askUser.keyboardHint: Use number / letter keys, or move with arrow keys and press Enter
askUser.multiSelectHint: Multiple selections are allowed; click Continue when ready

debug.title: Session Debug
debug.unavailable: Session debug context is not available in this environment
debug.fullReportHint: Only model, system prompt, user input, and assistant output are shown; tool calls are expanded by default, while tool results start collapsed.
debug.toolsReportHint: {{count}} tools visible to the model in this conversation, filtered by the current session mode.

app.disclaimer: 程小帮 can make mistakes. Check important info.

setup.title: Set up a model
setup.desc: Add one model with an API key to start chatting. You can change it later in Settings → Providers.

welcome.title: Let’s tune this workspace to you
welcome.desc: Set a few basics and connect a model before the first conversation.

profile.title: What will you mostly use 程小帮 for?
profile.desc: These choices only shape the local first-run experience. You can still adjust models and tools later.

work.title: Daily work
work.desc: Docs, decks, research, and cross-tool workflows.

code.title: Coding
code.desc: Read code, edit code, debug, and run developer commands.

both.title: Work and code
both.desc: Move naturally between office and development tasks.

model.existingDesc: A model is already available. You can start now or add another provider here.

rightPanel.changesNoProject: Open a project folder first — uncommitted changes show up here.
rightPanel.changesNotRepo: This project is not a Git repository.
rightPanel.changesBinaryFile: Binary or oversized file; content hidden
rightPanel.changesPatchParseFailed: Diff parsing failed; showing raw patch
rightPanel.reviewSelectFile: Expand a changed file to review it.
rightPanel.progressEmpty: When a task is complex enough, the AI's todo progress appears here.
rightPanel.chatEmpty: Start a small standalone chat in this project without interrupting the main one.
rightPanel.chatPlaceholder: Ask anything, press Enter to send
rightPanel.terminalNoProject: Open a project folder first — terminal commands run in the project directory.
rightPanel.terminalUnsupported: The embedded terminal is not available in this desktop environment.
rightPanel.browserEmpty: Enter a URL to start browsing, e.g. google.com or a local service like localhost:5173.
rightPanel.browserPlaceholder: Enter a URL, press Enter to visit
rightPanel.filesEmpty: Click a file path in the chat to preview it.
rightPanel.filesChooseFromTree: Select a file from the project tree to preview it.
rightPanel.projectFilesEmpty: No previewable files in this project directory.
rightPanel.fileDesktopOnly: File preview is only available in the desktop app.

ide.noneDetected: No local app detected for this project
ide.desktopOnly: Use the desktop app to open projects in local apps

home.heading: What should we work on in {{name}}?
home.headingNoProject: What should we work on today?

heroPhrases.today: What should we work on today?
heroPhrases.next: What should we move forward next?
heroPhrases.build: What idea should we build together?

home.subtitle: Office work and coding, all in one

starters.pptPrompt: Make a presentation on "A Brief History of Artificial Intelligence", plan the overall structure and key points per slide, and generate the PPT file.
starters.docPrompt: Write a "Guide to Effective Remote Work" document with a clear structure and complete key points, and save it as a Word file.
starters.refactorPrompt: Refactor this code to make it cleaner and easier to maintain:
starters.debugPrompt: I ran into this error — help me find the cause and fix it:

usage.title: Usage
usage.overviewDesc: Aggregates token usage across all conversations and estimates RMB cost from the model catalog.
usage.estimatedHint: Estimated from tokens and model pricing, not a provider bill.
usage.noBaselineHint: No recent baseline to compare yet.
usage.unavailable: Usage stats are not available in this environment
usage.heatmapDesc: Daily uses heatmap cells; weekly and total use bars. Hover to inspect a date or range.
usage.detailsDesc: All costs are estimates; custom or unknown-price models count tokens but not cost.
usage.cacheHint: Cache hits use the catalog cache-read price when available.
usage.emptyModels: No model usage to show yet.
usage.qualityHint: For older runs without a model snapshot, the estimate falls back to the session or current provider model.

skills.title: Skills
skills.listDesc: Built-in skills are always on; custom and plugin skills can be viewed and managed here, and invoked in chat via /skill-name.
skills.manageDesc: Create your own skill as <name>/SKILL.md (with name and description frontmatter) in the skills folder; it appears here after a restart.
skills.desktopOnly: This feature is only available in the desktop app

commands.title: Commands
commands.listDesc: Type / in the composer to invoke these commands; commands from plugins can be disabled individually here.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.subtitle: Plugins bundle skills, commands and MCP servers together. Once enabled, their resources show up on the matching pages.
plugins.importDesc: Install a plugin from a local folder/archive or a GitHub link; installed plugins live in ~/.chengxiaobang/plugins.
plugins.dialogHint: Pick a local folder/archive, or paste a GitHub link.
plugins.urlHint: Supports plugins with a plugin.json at the repo root or a subdirectory.
plugins.sectionNoneMcp: This plugin declares no MCP servers
plugins.uninstallConfirm: Uninstalling removes the skills, commands and MCP servers it provides. Continue?
plugins.manageDesc: Installed plugins live in ~/.chengxiaobang/plugins; open the folder to manage them manually.
plugins.desktopOnly: This feature is only available in the desktop app

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeDesc: Choose the app's light/dark appearance. "System" follows the current operating system automatically.
appearance.codePreviewDesc: Configure code block themes and layout for chat, tool details, and file previews.
appearance.codeLightThemeDesc: Highlight theme used by code blocks in light mode.
appearance.codeDarkThemeDesc: Highlight theme used by code blocks in dark mode.
appearance.codeWrapDesc: Wrap long content inside the preview area.
appearance.codeFontSizeDesc: Adjust the default font size for code previews.
appearance.codePreviewLiveDesc: Code previews switch colors with the current interface theme.

general.title: General
general.logsDesc: Open the date and three-hour segment folders containing main, renderer, and backend logs.
general.logsDesktopOnly: Viewing logs requires the desktop app
general.logsOpenFailed: Failed to open the log folder

providers.title: Providers
providers.configuredDesc: Only providers with a saved API Key are shown here; YAML templates stay inactive until configured.
providers.configYamlDesc: Advanced providers, model capabilities, context windows, prices, and tool-call limits come from ~/.chengxiaobang/config.yaml.
providers.configYamlDesktopOnly: Opening the config file requires the desktop app
providers.required: Configure at least one provider with an API Key before using the app.
providers.chooseTypeDesc: Use one dropdown to pick a region, then a provider; Base URL and API Key must be saved before it becomes active.
providers.name: Name
providers.hoverProviderForModels: Hover a provider to choose models
providers.keepKey: API key saved — leave blank to keep it

webSearch.title: Web Search
webSearch.connDesc: When enabled, the agent gets a pure Web Search tool for live public-web information with source URLs.
webSearch.enableDesc: When off, the model cannot see the WebSearch tool and no search requests are sent.
webSearch.tavilyDesc: Pure search API, independent from model providers, suited for agent research and fact checking.
webSearch.pricingHint: Uses Tavily Basic Search by default; saving does not spend credits, only manual tests or agent tool calls do.
webSearch.missingKey: Enter a Tavily API Key before enabling Web Search.

feishu.title: Feishu Bot
feishu.connDesc: Uses a Feishu Open Platform self-built app over a WebSocket long connection — no public URL needed.
feishu.scanDesc: Generate an official Feishu or Lark QR code, then save bot credentials and start the long connection after authorization.
feishu.installLoadingDesc: Requesting a one-time authorization QR code from the Feishu Open Platform.
feishu.installIdleDesc: Choose a platform, generate the QR code, and scan it with the matching client.
feishu.installConnected: Saved and attempted to connect the Feishu bot.
feishu.installQrPlaceholder: The QR code will appear here
feishu.manualDesc: If you already have self-built app credentials, you can still enter the App ID and App Secret manually.
feishu.enableDesc: Keeps a long connection: DMs answer directly, groups require @-mentioning the bot
feishu.fullAccessDesc: Read-only by default: writing files and running commands are auto-denied
feishu.fullAccessWarning: When enabled, messages from Feishu can directly read/write local files and run commands. Make sure you trust everyone who can reach this bot.
feishu.guideDesc: Scanning creates or authorizes a PersonalAgent app; messages sent while the app is closed are not redelivered.
feishu.guide1: Choose Feishu or Lark, generate a QR code, and confirm it in the matching client
feishu.guide2: After authorization, Chengxiaobang saves the App ID and writes the App Secret to the system secret store
feishu.guide3: Once the status is Connected, DMs work directly and group chats require @-mentioning the bot
feishu.guide4: To use an existing self-built app, open Advanced manual setup and keep entering credentials manually
feishu.guide5: Runs are read-only by default; enable full access only when Feishu should write files or run commands

notice.providerRequired: Configure at least one model with an API Key first.
notice.openFolderDesktopOnly: Opening a folder requires the desktop app — the browser preview has no system file-picker access.
notice.addContextDesktopOnly: Adding file context requires the desktop app — the browser preview has no system file-read access.
notice.addDroppedContextDesktopOnly: Dragging files in requires the desktop app — the browser preview has no system file-read access.
notice.dropFilePathUnavailable: The dropped file has no readable local path and was skipped.
notice.dropNoUsableFile: No dropped file can be added.
notice.skipDroppedUnsupported: Skipped {{name}}: folders or unknown file types cannot be added by drag-and-drop yet
notice.attachmentBlock:
Here is the content of file {{name}}:
```
{{text}}
```
notice.messageFeedbackFailed: Failed to save feedback. Please try again
notice.openArtifactDesktopOnly: Opening this file requires the desktop app
notice.createBlankProjectFailed: Failed to create a blank project. Please try again
notice.abortFailed: Failed to stop the run. Please try again.

scheduledTask.savedToSession: The result was added to the original conversation.

plan.heading: Plan
plan.bookmarkLabel: Plan progress {{index}} / {{total}}, jump back to the plan card
plan.adjustPlaceholder: No, tell Chengxiaobang what to change

updates.downloadedDesc: Version {{version}} is ready. Restart to finish installing.
updates.notAvailableDesc: Current version {{current}} has no available update.
updates.disabledDesc: This environment does not support auto update.
updates.errorDesc: The update flow hit a problem.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Built-in skills work out of the box; add popular skills from the marketplace, or import and create your own.
skills.marketHint: Added skills can be invoked with /name in chat, and the model uses them automatically when a task matches.
skills.addConfirm: Add skill "{{name}}" to My skills? It can then be invoked with /{{name}} in chat.
skills.removeConfirm: Remove skill "{{name}}" from My skills? You can add it again from the marketplace later.
skills.deleteConfirm: Delete custom skill "{{name}}"? Its files will be removed from disk.
skills.addCustomHint: Paste a GitHub link with a SKILL.md to import quickly, or let 程小帮 create one for you in chat.
skills.importUrlHint: Repository, directory, or SKILL.md file links are supported; the repo must be public.
skills.chatCreateHint: Describe the skill you want in natural language, or send 程小帮 a GitHub link — it will fetch the content, draft, and install the skill for you.
skills.chatCreatePrompt: I want to create a new skill. My requirements are:
skills.detailUnavailable: Could not load the skill content.
